## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Build/release workflow

## Testing

List commands you ran and results.

```bash
# example
swift test --disable-sandbox
./scripts/build_and_run.sh --verify
```

## UI Evidence (if applicable)

- [ ] Screenshots attached
- [ ] Recording attached
- [ ] N/A

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is scoped and focused
- [ ] Tests updated/added for behavior change
- [ ] Docs updated (README/docs/CONTRIBUTING) when needed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] No secrets or signing exports included
